overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic waterfront district in a cyberpunk city. The player character walks along a wet concrete promenade past modern glass buildings, enters an outdoor restaurant seating area, and continues toward the neon-lit city center. Overcast weather creates a cool, diffused lighting atmosphere with reflective wet surfaces throughout.

events.description: finishes ascending stairs and continues walking on level sidewalk
passing by pedestrians walking in opposing directions on the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront sidewalk, ascending stairs initially then proceeding past the modern glass building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in vest walking toward camera then passing by on the left

tall vertical digital advertisement screen displaying a character portrait
metal safety railing along the edge of the water
wide concrete staircase leading up to the sidewalk level
tall palm trees lining the waterfront in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the camera ascending concrete stairs to a waterfront promenade. The scene features a modern glass office building on the left and an open waterfront on the right. The pavement is wet from recent rain, reflecting the overcast sky. Sparse pedestrians walk along the path, including a person in a vest approaching from the left and another leaning on the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining terrace of CIRKUS restaurant under building overhang

events.description: entering the covered outdoor seating area of the CIRKUS restaurant
approaching the service counter with a vendor visible inside the restaurant

agents.ego_description: entering the restaurant outdoor seating area and approaching the service counter to observe the vendor

notable_agents.action: restaurant vendor standing behind the service counter looking toward the camera
customer sitting at outdoor table with an overturned chair nearby

entered.detail: illuminated sign with 'CIRKUS' text above the restaurant entrance
round metal tables and chairs arranged on the terrace
large white planters with tropical plants dividing the seating area
indoor service bar with neon lighting and menu displays visible through the window

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the semi-covered outdoor dining area of the CIRKUS restaurant, transitioning from the open waterfront to a sheltered terrace with potted plants and dining furniture. The service counter becomes visible with a vendor standing behind it, and a customer sits at a nearby table. The futuristic building wall is now closer on the left, while the waterfront view recedes to the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with city skyline view

events.description: exiting the restaurant terrace back to the open waterfront promenade
turning left toward the dense city center with tall neon-lit buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade and turning toward the urban city center with neon signage

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon signs
rectangular concrete seating blocks arranged along the promenade
tall commercial towers with bright neon advertisements and colorful lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the restaurant and continues along the open waterfront promenade, passing concrete benches and palm trees. The scene opens up to reveal a panoramic view of the city skyline with dense neon-lit skyscrapers. The camera turns left toward the urban center, moving away from the restaurant building and toward the brightly lit commercial towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, rain-slicked waterfront promenade into a sheltered dining terrace and finally toward a dense, neon-lit urban skyline. It begins by ascending concrete stairs beside a modern glass office building, moving across wet pavement that reflects the overcast sky as sparse pedestrians pass by. As the camera advances, the open waterfront gives way to the semi-covered terrace of the CIRKUS restaurant, shifting the focus toward potted plants, dining furniture, and a service counter. The scene then opens back up as the camera exits the restaurant, passing concrete benches and palm trees while the horizon expands to reveal a panoramic view of towering skyscrapers. Finally, the camera turns left, moving away from the waterfront and gliding toward the brightly lit commercial center of the city.
